title: M.Y Royal Court Pack of Tennis Balls
features: Premium Quality Tennis Balls: Made from long lasting and hard wearing materials, offering superior resistance to wear and tear
Predictable Bounce: The combination of materials and construction mean the M.Y Tennis Balls will offer true bounce game after game
Wide Range of Use: Can be used for a number of different sports as training balls, and are naturally perfect for Tennis!
Not Just For Sports: These Tennis Balls are also perfect for dogs too!
Pack of 3 Balls. Suitable for ages 3+
description: 3 pack of non-pressurised yellow felted Royal Court Tennis Balls. The neon yellow balls are highly visable, making them easy to spot even with the fastest of serves. Ideal for all kinds of recreational use, and both novices and seasoned pros alike. Suitable for Ages 3+.
